description_long: This is a pair of high-top athletic sneakers featuring a bold color scheme of white, black, and red. The shoes have a prominent red swoosh logo on the side panels and a white winged emblem near the ankle collar, suggesting a basketball-inspired design. The upper is constructed from a combination of smooth and perforated leather panels, with black overlays and white underlays, and red accents on the collar and outsole. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with black laces threaded through reinforced eyelets. The midsole is white, while the outsole is red with a visible tread pattern for traction. The overall appearance is clean, structured, and indicative of a new or barely worn condition.
description: A pair of high-top, white, black, and red athletic sneakers with a red swoosh and winged logo, featuring a structured leather upper and standard lacing. The shoes appear new and are designed for urban or athletic use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the toe box perforations, black overlays, and the symmetrical lacing system.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the red swoosh, white winged logo near the ankle, and the layered leather construction.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black and red heel collar, white heel tab, and the back seam details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the red swoosh and winged logo, emphasizing the high-top ankle support and color blocking.
attribute_logo: White winged basketball logo on the ankle collar and red swoosh on the side panels.
